headline: Apple’s AI overhaul seen driving upgrade cycle as BofA backs long-term upside
summary: Investing.com -- Apple's latest artificial intelligence strategy unveiled at its 2026 Worldwide Developers Conference represents a significant reset that could strengthen its ecosystem and support future hardware upgrades, according to analysts at Bank of America Securities. The brokerage maintained its Buy rating on the iPhone maker with a $380 price objective, arguing that investors are underestimating the significance of the company's revamped Siri AI architecture.
